headings: CONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON FINAL PAYMENT
text: The undersigned being duly sworn, states that (s)he is an authorized agent for [SUBCONTRACTOR NAME] ('Subcontractor'). Pursuant to its Subcontract Agreement with Contractor, and in consideration of the final payment in the amount of $ Total Amount , Subcontractor hereby conditionally waives and releases its lien and right to claim a lien for labor, services, or materials furnished to GS Construction Mountain, LLC ('Contractor') for incorporation into GSC Birchway Commerce City (the 'Project') owned GS Commerce City Apt Owner, LLC ('Owner') being constructed on the following real property (the 'Property'):
